output.code: import json, re, unicodedata, os, sys, textwrap, itertools, math
import json, io, os, re, unicodedata, difflib, math, itertools

# Load Quranic verses
quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-FMu3bAgEAQtmEQQC8jx6tp-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-Q1ZkZ7hNQqPEcQ1vsVE9Pf-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

len(quran), list(quran[0].keys())[:10]

def normalize_arabic(s):
    # remove tashkeel (diacritics), tatweel, punctuation-ish, unify hamzas, digits to ascii
    if s is None:
        return ""
    # remove diacritics
    s = ''.join(c for c in s if unicodedata.category(c) != 'Mn')
    # Tatweel
    s = s.replace('ـ', '')
    # unify different forms of alef and hamza to alif without hamza?
    s = re.sub('[إأٱآا]', 'ا', s)
    s = s.replace('ى', 'ي').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    # punctuation and non letters/digits/spaces
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', ' ', s)
    # normalize spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip().lower()
    return s

snippet = "قَالُوا ادْعُ لَنَا رَبَّكَ يُبَيِّنْ لَنَا مَا هِيَ قَالَ إِنَّهُ يَقُولُ إِنَّهَا بَقَرَةٌ لَا ذَلُولٌ تُثِيرُ الْأَرْضَ وَلَا تَسْقِي الْحَرْثَ مُسَلَّمَةٌ لَا شِيَةَ فِيهَا قَالُوا الْآنَ جِئْتَ بِالْحَقِّ فَذَبَحُوهَا وَمَا كَادُوا يَفْعَلُونَ"
n_snip = normalize_arabic(snippet)
n_snip[:200], len(n_snip)

# Search for verses with parts of this snippet
matches = []
for v in quran:
    t = v['ayah_text']
    if any(p in t for p in ["قَالُوا ادْعُ لَنَا رَبَّكَ يُبَيِّنْ لَنَا مَا هِيَ", "قَالَ إِنَّهُ يَقُولُ إِنَّهَا بَقَرَةٌ لَا ذَلُولٌ"]):
        matches.append(v)
len(matches)

def lcs(a, b):
    # compute LCS length
    # dynamic programming optimized memory
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    prev = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        cur = [0]*(m+1)
        ai = a[i-1]
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            if ai == b[j-1]:
                cur[j] = prev[j-1] + 1
            else:
                cur[j] = max(prev[j], cur[j-1])
        prev = cur
    return prev[m]

orig = snippet
cand_71 = [v for v in matches if v['ayah_id']==71][0]['ayah_text']
cand_70 = [v for v in matches if v['ayah_id']==70][0]['ayah_text']

def norm(s):
    return normalize_arabic(s)

def sim_ratio(a, b):
    a_norm = norm(a)
    b_norm = norm(b)
    L = lcs(a_norm, b_norm)
    # ratio relative to a length
    return L / max(1, len(a_norm)), len(a_norm), len(b_norm), L, a_norm, b_norm

sim_ratio(orig, cand_71)
